description: GeoClaw finite-volume South Fork high-flow single-reach profile closure for the corrected-boundary Milestone 18 real-world row.

source.notes: Derived from normalized GeoClaw h/u/v fields for the South Fork American high-runnable advanced single-reach row; used only as bounded real-world fixture calibration with feature forcing disabled, finite-volume profile fast path enabled, and initial-mass preservation disabled for the open-boundary comparison.
